working_on: Phase 5 Metaphysics core seed (P5-02a) — third routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; first task after the epistemology subdomain fully closed (P5-01a + P5-01b at S-0050/S-0051/S-0053). Apply via Supabase MCP; verify with validate.py. Specialized metaphysics (modality, free will, properties/universals, mereology) deferred to P5-02b.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0030_seed_metaphysics_part1.sql with the four core metaphysics pillars at the granularity principle (~27 nodes covering being/ontology cluster, identity cluster, causation cluster, time cluster) and within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges (~32). Run engine/tools/validate.py with venv Python so the live graph audit engages. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED (mirrors P5-01a/P5-01b distribution; well above the 70% floor per phase_5.md T2-B). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in v1 registry). Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per T2-G #1. Specialized metaphysics deferred to P5-02b. End state: P5-02a complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-02a passes both criteria. Per S-0053 procedural finding, deliverable commit (migration + ROUTING.md) is split from status-flip commit (auto_target.json) so the staged scope-check engages on deliverables under in_progress task.

commits.summary: eager-claim S-0054 — routine task P5-02a Metaphysics core

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope: author 0030_seed_metaphysics_part1.sql with 27 metaphysics core nodes + 30 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges; append ROUTING.md per-session narrative; apply via Supabase MCP; verify with validate.py; pass both P5-02a criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes); confidence_level 100% INTERPRETED; PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited; specialized metaphysics deferred to P5-02b; cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11; commits split per S-0053 finding (deliverable separate from status-flip). Delivered exactly that — 27 nodes (100% INTERPRETED), 30 edges (all pedagogical_prerequisite, all within-domain), graph_version 3->4, no PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md edit, no cross-domain edges, no specialized concepts authored, both criteria PASS, validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails. Two-commit pattern adopted: deliverable commit 1920b4a landed under in_progress task with staged scope-check engaging (4 checks, 0 fails); status-flip + close bundled in this close commit. No descoping, no reordering, no mid-session deferrals.

outcome_summary: Phase 5 metaphysics core seed (P5-02a) lands at S-0054. 27 nodes + 30 edges across four pillars (being/ontology, identity, causation, time) per phase_5.md T1-B. graph_version 3->4. Live totals after apply: 81 nodes, 102 edges in paideia-dev. Cold-review pass matches contract end-to-end (sub-agent verified node/edge counts, single-tag domain[], graph_version=4 everywhere, transaction wrap, all source/target IDs resolve, no cycles, no DDL, no new predicates, granularity-principle adherence, specialized concepts correctly deferred). Both criteria PASS. validate.py: 30 checks, 0 hard-fails, 81 soft-warns (76 missing_rigor_score expected per T2-C — partial-seed shape with 81 total nodes; 5 issue_collision: #1, #2 upstream MemPalace + #12, #13 from S-0052 audit + new #14 filed this session). Two-commit pattern adopted per S-0053 finding: deliverable commit 1920b4a (0030_*.sql + ROUTING.md) staged scope-check engaged with 4 checks, 0 fails; status flip + close bundled in this commit (operational allowlist only). In-band Issue #14 filed for tech-debt: routine-fired check_target.py / validate.py silently fail when venv not on PATH (system Python lacks psycopg → false-FAIL on migration_applied). Out of P5-02a scope_lock; user direction was to file the issue. Backlog 4 -> 5 (added #14; #1, #2, #12, #13 carryover). Forward state: P5-02b Metaphysics specialized now eligible (depends_on [P5-01a, P5-02a] both complete); next routine fire's eligibility walk picks P5-02b in walk order.
